productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Grey Melange Jumpsuit
description: Style Note Perfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsGrey in colour all-in-one jumpsuit, has a round neck with a pink outline, full buttoned placket and sleeveless, elasticated waist with drawstrings, shorts attached and pockets on the sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
